calendar.description: House Economic Development and Workforce Services Hearing
Senate Economic Development and Workforce Services Hearing

general_provisions: This bill modifies provisions related to social media data portability and interoperability.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>allows users to select portions of their social media data to transfer; <hr><ltbullet>requires social media platforms to share user data in real time when users move to other platforms;<hr><ltbullet>requires consent from users before their comments or interactions can be included when others transfer data;<hr><ltbullet>clarifies when users must give permission for their data to be shared; and<hr><ltbullet>protects social media companies from penalties for temporary technical problems if they make good faith efforts to fix them.
